summary: Doc build failed because importing transformers code raised a SyntaxError due to an unresolved merge conflict marker in source, causing conversion of llama.md to MDX to abort.
root_cause: A merge conflict marker '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' is present in transformers/modeling_utils.py (around line 1974), causing a SyntaxError when the module is imported during the documentation build.
relevant_tests: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.

evidence.reason: Shows the exact source file and line where the problem occurs.
This is a merge conflict marker left in the source, which is invalid Python and explains the SyntaxError.
The interpreter raised a syntax error when trying to import the module, the immediate symptom of the conflict marker.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: The documentation build failed while converting llama.md, which triggered the import of the problematic module.

suggested_fix: Open transformers/modeling_utils.py, resolve and remove the merge conflict markers (e.g. the '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' block), ensure the file contains valid Python, commit the fix, and re-run the documentation build.
